entries.name: APP_IMAGE
entries.description: Immutable container image built by the production deploy (scripts/deploy-production-local.sh on the fleet).

entries.name: APP_TIER
entries.description: Runtime tier; prod enables tier-isolation and production auth checks.

entries.name: NODE_ENV
entries.description: Node runtime mode.

entries.name: FEATURE_FLAGS
entries.description: Comma-separated production feature flags.

entries.name: DATABASE_URL
entries.description: Production Postgres app-role connection string.

entries.name: DATABASE_URL_PROD_RO
entries.description: Optional read-only production pool for explicit read-prod-ro workflows.

entries.name: DATABASE_SSL_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED
entries.description: DigitalOcean managed Postgres TLS mode. Prefer setting DATABASE_CA_CERT and leaving this 'true' for verified TLS; 'false' disables certificate verification and should only be the fallback when no CA bundle is available.

entries.name: DATABASE_CA_CERT
entries.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate (or bundle) for the managed Postgres TLS endpoint. When set, the pg client verifies the server cert against it (ssl.ca + rejectUnauthorized:true) so DATABASE_SSL_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=false is no longer required. Download from DO Console -> Databases -> sitelayer-db -> Connection Details -> Download CA certificate.

entries.name: ACTIVE_COMPANY_SLUG
entries.description: Fallback company slug for legacy/demo paths.

entries.name: ACTIVE_USER_ID
entries.description: Fallback user id for legacy/demo paths.

entries.name: ALLOWED_ORIGINS
entries.description: Comma-separated CORS allowlist; production must not include localhost.

entries.name: SITELAYER_PUBLIC_BASE
entries.description: Public base URL agents use when calling back into Sitelayer.

entries.name: QBO_CLIENT_ID
entries.description: Intuit QuickBooks Online OAuth client id.

entries.name: QBO_CLIENT_SECRET
entries.description: Intuit QuickBooks Online OAuth client secret.

entries.name: QBO_REDIRECT_URI
entries.description: Public Intuit OAuth callback URL.

entries.name: QBO_SUCCESS_REDIRECT_URI
entries.description: Public UI redirect after a successful QBO connection.

entries.name: QBO_ENVIRONMENT
entries.description: QBO API environment: sandbox or production.

entries.name: QBO_BASE_URL
entries.description: QBO API base URL used by worker live-push paths.

entries.name: QBO_LIVE_ESTIMATE_PUSH
entries.description: Set to 1 to let the worker post estimates to QBO.

entries.name: QBO_LIVE_RENTAL_INVOICE
entries.description: Set to 1 to let the worker post rental invoices to QBO.

entries.name: QBO_LIVE_LABOR_PAYROLL
entries.description: Set to 1 to let the worker post approved labor entries to QBO TimeActivity. Requires sandbox smoke + worker bounce on flip.

entries.name: QBO_RENTAL_INCOME_ACCOUNT_ID
entries.description: QBO account id used as the rental invoice income account.

entries.name: QBO_STATE_SECRET
entries.description: HMAC secret for QBO OAuth state.

entries.name: ESTIMATE_SHARE_SECRET
entries.description: OWN required HMAC secret for public estimate share-link tokens (sales loop / client portal). MUST be set independently in prod: it still falls back to QBO_STATE_SECRET when unset, so leaving it blank silently couples it to QBO_STATE_SECRET and rotating QBO_STATE_SECRET would invalidate every customer estimate/portal share link. Mint with `openssl rand -base64 32`.

entries.name: APP_PUBLIC_URL
entries.description: Public URL the app lives under. Used to render shareable estimate links and the rentals customer portal.

entries.name: QBO_WEBHOOK_VERIFIER
entries.description: Intuit webhook verifier token. HMAC-SHA256 verifies the intuit-signature header on POST /api/webhooks/qbo; an absent/wrong value silently drops inbound QBO notifications, so the prod render enforces it.

entries.name: CLERK_SECRET_KEY
entries.description: Clerk Backend API key used by the worker to hydrate notification recipients.

entries.name: CLERK_JWT_KEY
entries.description: Clerk JWT public key used by API auth verification.

entries.name: CLERK_ISSUER
entries.description: Expected Clerk issuer.

entries.name: CLERK_AUTHORIZED_PARTIES
entries.description: CSV of allowed azp/aud values for Clerk JWT verification (apps/api/src/auth.ts). Prod should set the web origin (https://sitelayer.sandolab.xyz); absent = warn-and-accept (logged), set = enforced.

entries.name: CLERK_WEBHOOK_SECRET
entries.description: Svix webhook signing secret for Clerk events.

entries.name: INTERNAL_AUTH_TOKEN
entries.description: Internal service bearer token.

entries.name: AUTH_ALLOW_HEADER_FALLBACK
entries.description: Legacy header-auth fallback flag; leave unset/false in production.

entries.name: AUTH_ALLOW_HEADER_FALLBACK_BREAK_GLASS
entries.description: Explicit break-glass unlock for production header fallback.

entries.name: DO_SPACES_KEY
entries.description: Scoped DigitalOcean Spaces access key.

entries.name: DO_SPACES_SECRET
entries.description: Scoped DigitalOcean Spaces secret key.

entries.name: DO_SPACES_REGION
entries.description: DigitalOcean Spaces region.

entries.name: DO_SPACES_ENDPOINT
entries.description: DigitalOcean Spaces endpoint.

entries.name: DO_SPACES_BUCKET
entries.description: Production blueprint storage bucket.

entries.name: ALLOW_LOCAL_BLUEPRINT_STORAGE_IN_PROD
entries.description: Emergency-only local blueprint storage fallback flag.

entries.name: BLUEPRINT_STORAGE_ROOT
entries.description: Local blueprint storage path used by dev/preview/fallback mode.

entries.name: SENTRY_DSN
entries.description: API Sentry DSN.

entries.name: SENTRY_WORKER_DSN
entries.description: Optional worker-specific Sentry DSN.

entries.name: SENTRY_ENVIRONMENT
entries.description: Sentry environment label.

entries.name: SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE
entries.description: API/worker trace sample rate.

entries.name: SENTRY_ORG
entries.description: Sentry organization slug for debug trace lookups.

entries.name: SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN
entries.description: Sentry auth token, only needed when production debug trace lookup is enabled.

entries.name: DEBUG_TRACE_TOKEN
entries.description: Bearer token for production debug trace lookup.

entries.name: DEBUG_ALLOW_PROD
entries.description: Break-glass flag for production debug endpoints.

entries.name: SITELAYER_WORK_REQUEST_WEBHOOK_TOKEN
entries.description: Legacy fallback Bearer token for /api/work-requests/:id/agent-callback rows created before scoped dispatch tokens. New dispatches carry a per-dispatch scoped token.

entries.name: FEEDBACK_INVITE_SECRET
entries.description: HMAC signing secret for the prod signed-invite feedback portal (/feedback?token=, routes/feedback-invites.ts). Unset = portal returns 503 'feedback invite signing is not configured'. Random hex (openssl rand -hex 32); rotating invalidates outstanding invite links.

entries.name: BLUEPRINT_VISION_MODE
entries.description: Blueprint-vision capture provider: 'gemini' (Google Gemini, needs GEMINI_API_KEY) | 'live' (Anthropic, needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) | unset = dry-run. Drives apps/api/src/takeoff-capture-pipelines/blueprint-vision.ts for POST /api/projects/:id/takeoff-drafts/capture (kind=blueprint_vision).

entries.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
entries.description: Google Gemini API key for the blueprint_vision gemini capture path. Unset = gemini path falls back to dry-run. Metered ($) — gemini-3.1-flash-lite ~ $0.0015/takeoff (batch). Needed by BOTH api and worker containers since the async capture cutover (2026-06-12): the worker (runners/takeoff-capture.ts) makes the live call.

entries.name: GEMINI_VISION_MODEL
entries.description: Gemini model for blueprint vision takeoff. Default gemini-3.1-flash-lite — the bang-for-buck winner from the 2026-06-05 model comparison (docs/AI_TAKEOFF_PIPELINE.md).

entries.name: MESH_WORK_REQUEST_DISPATCH_URL
entries.description: Optional worker target for dispatch_mesh_work_request outbox rows.

entries.name: MESH_WORK_REQUEST_DISPATCH_TOKEN
entries.description: Optional Bearer token used by the worker when posting context work requests to Mesh.

entries.name: MESH_API_URL
entries.description: Optional mesh API base URL. The operator-chat dispatcher POSTs <MESH_API_URL>/api/tasks; work-requests builds the mesh task cancel URL from it. Unset = AI-chat dispatch returns 'not configured' and the widget poll times out (~60s).

entries.name: MESH_API_TOKEN
entries.description: Optional generic mesh API bearer; used as the work-request dispatch token fallback when MESH_WORK_REQUEST_DISPATCH_TOKEN is unset.

entries.name: AGENT_FEED_TOKENS
entries.description: Optional JSON map of agent-feed audience to bearer token for /api/agent-feed machine clients. Unset = agent-feed routes fail closed with 503.

entries.name: AGENT_FEED_CAPTURE_ANALYZER
entries.description: Set '1' to enqueue ONE addressed capture-analyzer agent-feed Concern (audience 'capture-analyzer') at capture-session finalize for the local pull-executor; needs a matching AGENT_FEED_TOKENS key. Unset/other = finalize never enqueues analyzer concerns.

entries.name: SITELAYER_OPS_DIAGNOSTIC_AGENT_AUDIENCE
entries.description: Optional Mobile Ops onsite diagnostics agent-feed audience. Must match an AGENT_FEED_TOKENS key and the pull executor PULL_AUDIENCE. Unset = diagnostic session actions stay audit-only.

entries.name: SITELAYER_CHAT_WEBHOOK_TOKEN
entries.description: Optional Bearer the mesh CLI runner presents on POST /api/ai/chat/:id/respond. Unset = the chat-respond webhook returns 503 'webhook disabled'.

entries.name: CONTEXT_WORK_DISPATCH_AUTO_DISPATCH
entries.description: Worker context-work dispatch gate. Defaults on once MESH_WORK_REQUEST_DISPATCH_URL is set; set '0' to disable, '1' to force. Inert without a dispatch URL.

entries.name: CAPTURE_AUTH_AUTO_DISPATCH
entries.description: Set '1' to auto-dispatch trusted authenticated triage captures into the work-request outbox (apps/api/src/routes/capture-sessions.ts). Off by default.

entries.name: CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_ANALYSIS_AUTO_DISPATCH
entries.description: Set '1' to auto-dispatch a work item once capture artifact analysis is ready (apps/worker/src/runners/capture-artifact-analysis.ts). Off by default.

entries.name: MAX_CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_BYTES
entries.description: Maximum accepted capture artifact upload size in bytes.

entries.name: CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_ANALYSIS_INTERVAL_MS
entries.description: Worker throttle for capture artifact analysis passes.

entries.name: CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_ANALYSIS_LIMIT
entries.description: Max capture artifacts analyzed per worker pass.

entries.name: CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_ANALYSIS_MAX_BYTES
entries.description: Maximum artifact bytes loaded into the analysis worker for text/audio/video processing.

entries.name: CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_AUDIO_ANALYSIS_MODE
entries.description: Raw audio analysis mode. 'off' keeps droplet workers from claiming a host-local Whisper service; 'local-whisper' posts to CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_WHISPER_URL and is intended for the GPU media worker or an explicitly provisioned Whisper host.

entries.name: CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_WHISPER_URL
entries.description: Whisper-compatible endpoint used when CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_AUDIO_ANALYSIS_MODE=local-whisper.

entries.name: CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_WHISPER_PAYLOAD_MODE
entries.description: Payload sent to local Whisper. Use 'base64' for network services; use 'path' only when the worker and Whisper share a filesystem namespace.

entries.name: CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_WHISPER_TIMEOUT_MS
entries.description: Timeout for a single local Whisper transcription request.

entries.name: CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_WHISPER_UNAVAILABLE_POLICY
entries.description: How audio analysis handles transient Whisper failures. 'retry' leaves the artifact unprocessed for a later GPU media-worker pass; 'skip' records a permanent skipped analysis event.

entries.name: CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_VIDEO_ANALYSIS_MODE
entries.description: Raw video analysis mode. 'off' disables it; 'frames-only' stores frame samples; 'gemini' enables the media processor path.

entries.name: WORK_REQUEST_DISPATCH_MAX_PENDING
entries.description: Backpressure: skip work-request dispatch when pending dispatch rows exceed this (clamped 1-1000).

entries.name: WORK_REQUEST_DISPATCH_MAX_FAILED
entries.description: Backpressure: skip work-request dispatch when failed dispatch rows exceed this (clamped 1-1000).

entries.name: MESH_TRACE_FORWARD_URL
entries.description: Mesh product-trace ingest URL. Off unless URL + COMPONENT + SECRET are all set; then the worker ships low-PII workflow/capture flow shape. Unset = trace forwarding silently no-ops (best-effort).

entries.name: MESH_TRACE_HMAC_COMPONENT
entries.description: Component name registered in mesh component_auth_secrets for trace-forward HMAC auth.

entries.name: MESH_TRACE_HMAC_SECRET
entries.description: Hex-encoded HMAC secret bytes for the trace-forward component.

entries.name: MESH_TRACE_PROJECT_KEY
entries.description: Project key stamped on forwarded product traces.

entries.name: MESH_TRACE_FORWARD_INTERVAL_MS
entries.description: Trace forwarder tick interval in ms.

entries.name: MESH_TRACE_FORWARD_WINDOW_MIN
entries.description: Overlapping trace look-back window per tick, in minutes.

entries.name: MESH_TRACE_FORWARD_TIMEOUT_MS
entries.description: Hard per-POST abort ceiling (ms) for the trace forwarder so a hung gateway cannot park a socket.

entries.name: MESH_OBSERVATION_INGRESS_URL
entries.description: Mesh /api/observations/ingest URL. Off unless URL + COMPONENT + SECRET are all set; best-effort HMAC POST of work-item status transitions. Unset = observation forwarding silently no-ops.

entries.name: MESH_OBSERVATION_COMPONENT
entries.description: Component name registered in mesh component_auth_secrets for observation HMAC auth (e.g. sitelayer-worker).

entries.name: MESH_OBSERVATION_SECRET_HEX
entries.description: Hex-encoded secret bytes for the observation component.

entries.name: DEMO_APP_ORIGIN
entries.description: Demo-tier portal origin allowed on capture/portal endpoints. Only meaningful when APP_TIER=demo; defaults to the portal base URL when unset.

entries.name: WORK_REQUEST_CALLBACK_TOKEN_TTL_HOURS
entries.description: Hours before a scoped work-request callback token expires.

entries.name: WORK_REQUEST_REVIEW_STALE_HOURS
entries.description: Hours before review_ready context work items become review_stale.

entries.name: WORK_REQUEST_AGENT_STALE_HOURS
entries.description: Hours before agent_running context work items become proposal_expired.

entries.name: WORK_REQUEST_STALE_SWEEP_INTERVAL_MS
entries.description: Worker throttle for stale context work item sweeps.

entries.name: WORK_REQUEST_STALE_SWEEP_LIMIT
entries.description: Max context work items swept per stale-runner pass.

entries.name: WORK_REQUEST_CALLBACK_MISSING_HOURS
entries.description: Hours after agent.dispatch_acknowledged with no later callback before the local reconciler writes agent.callback_missing and proposal_expired.

entries.name: WORK_REQUEST_CALLBACK_RECONCILE_INTERVAL_MS
entries.description: Worker throttle for the lost-callback reconciler.

entries.name: WORK_REQUEST_CALLBACK_RECONCILE_LIMIT
entries.description: Max acknowledged-but-missing-callback work items reconciled per pass.

entries.name: API_METRICS_TOKEN
entries.description: Bearer token for production /api/metrics.

entries.name: PUSHOVER_TOKEN
entries.description: Pushover application token for the operator-alert route (e.g. the e2e runner pushes a high-priority alert on a red verify:full). Optional; absent => Pushover alerts silently no-op.

entries.name: PUSHOVER_USER
entries.description: Pushover user/group key paired with PUSHOVER_TOKEN. Optional; both must be set for a Pushover alert to send.

entries.name: EMAIL_PROVIDER
entries.description: Outbound email provider.

entries.name: EMAIL_FROM
entries.description: Default outbound email sender.

entries.name: RESEND_API_KEY
entries.description: Resend API key when EMAIL_PROVIDER=resend.

entries.name: SENDGRID_API_KEY
entries.description: SendGrid API key when EMAIL_PROVIDER=sendgrid.

entries.name: NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED
entries.description: Worker notification drain toggle.

entries.name: NOTIFICATION_BATCH_LIMIT
entries.description: Maximum notifications drained per worker batch.

entries.name: NOTIFICATION_MAX_ATTEMPTS
entries.description: Maximum notification send attempts before dead-lettering.

entries.name: NOTIFICATION_PROVIDER_FAILURE_THRESHOLD
entries.description: Consecutive provider failures that stop the current notification batch.

entries.name: CLERK_EMAIL_CACHE_TTL_MS
entries.description: Worker Clerk email cache TTL in milliseconds.

entries.name: SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT_MS
entries.description: Graceful shutdown timeout.

entries.name: SITELAYER_ENV_ENFORCE
entries.description: Phase-2 API env validator toggle. Leave unset until production warnings are clean.

entries.name: VITE_API_URL
entries.description: Build-time SPA API base URL. Blank means same-origin.

entries.name: VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY
entries.description: Build-time public Clerk publishable key.

entries.name: VITE_COMPANY_SLUG
entries.description: Build-time fallback company slug.

entries.name: VITE_USER_ID
entries.description: Build-time fallback user id.

entries.name: VITE_APP_TIER
entries.description: Build-time tier ribbon/config.

entries.name: VITE_SENTRY_DSN
entries.description: Build-time web Sentry DSN.

entries.name: VITE_SENTRY_ENVIRONMENT
entries.description: Build-time web Sentry environment label.

entries.name: VITE_SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE
entries.description: Build-time web trace sample rate.

entries.name: VITE_SENTRY_REPLAYS_SESSION_SAMPLE_RATE
entries.description: Build-time web session replay sample rate.

entries.name: VITE_SENTRY_REPLAYS_ON_ERROR_SAMPLE_RATE
entries.description: Build-time web on-error replay sample rate.

entries.name: SENTRY_WEB_PROJECT
entries.description: Sentry web project slug for source map uploads.

entries.name: DEPLOY_NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK
entries.description: Slack-compatible webhook URL (Slack, Discord shim, Mattermost) for deploy-result notifications. Currently unwired under the local-fleet deploy model: the deploy-droplet GitHub Actions workflow that posted to it was removed in 70b9584b, and scripts/deploy-production-local.sh has no notification step. To re-enable notifications, add a local deploy-notification hook to the deploy script that reads this value.
